plugins.name: memory-compiler
plugins.description: Plugin for Cole Medin's Claude Memory Compiler. `setup` clones the memory-compiler repo (upstream, a fork, or a custom URL) into any project and wires its hooks into the project's Claude Code settings. `migrate` swaps an existing install's origin to a different memory-compiler repo and fast-forwards. `show-compile-progress` replaces the empty popup during end-of-day compile with a labelled console showing a banner, spinner, and live step log.

plugins.name: memory-bridge
plugins.description: Forwards memory-compiler daily logs from a project to a configurable HTTP ingestion endpoint, so per-project session knowledge can feed a cross-project memory store. Installs a SessionEnd hook and a stdlib-only forwarder into the target project.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills. `commit` stages changes and creates a conventional commit message generated from the diff. `commit-push` does the same and pushes to the current remote branch in one step.

plugins.name: claude-md
plugins.description: Skills for maintaining the CLAUDE.md tree in a project. `audit` performs a maintenance pass: finds dead file/symbol references, duplicate content across sibling files, oversized sections, and outdated patterns; reports findings as a punch list and applies edits only after explicit approval.

plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Skills for working with the current Claude Code session. `reflect` runs an end-of-session retrospective: surfaces durable lessons from what just happened, separates them from one-off task minutiae, and proposes concrete CLAUDE.md edits, new skill ideas, or memory entries.

plugins.name: skill
plugins.description: Skills for maintaining the user's Claude skill collection. `audit` walks `~/.claude/skills/` and flags visibility risk (side-effecting skills that should be auto-fire-disabled, background-knowledge skills that should be hidden from /menu), non-deterministic steps that should be scripts, and duplicated logic across skills.
